description: Plain is a customer support platform for B2B software companies, centered on shared threads across email, Slack, and chat, with customer and tenant management and a help center.
summary: Plain (plain.com) exposes an official remote MCP server at `https://mcp.plain.com/mcp` authenticated over OAuth, and a Bearer-authenticated GraphQL API at `https://core-api.uk.plain.com/graphql/v1` for support workflows — threads, customers, tenants, labels, and help-center content.
